suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require worker handoff `commitId` to match the exact commit SHA used for final isolated verification; if post-handoff fixes land, require handoff amendment before marking complete.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of `m5-scrutiny-fixes` found handoff metadata pinned to `415b90e` while effective resolved code was at `eb22176`, reducing traceability between claimed and verified state.
